test_cases.description: Standard Garena event CSV with all required columns is passed, generating a valid HTML dashboard and structured report.
test_cases.input: CSV data containing Date, Play Daily Active/Churn/New, FC/MC Spent Active/Churn/New, Register, Login.
test_cases.expected_output: Generated HTML dashboard in the outputs folder and a structured analytical report covering all 4 frameworks.
test_cases.pass_criteria: The file outputs/fco-event-analytics/dashboard.html is created successfully, is not empty, and the output includes clear recommendations.

test_cases.description: Input data is missing critical column headers like Date or spent segments, triggering validation rejection.
test_cases.input: CSV text missing the Date column.
test_cases.expected_output: REJECT: Validation error indicating missing required Date column.
test_cases.pass_criteria: The agent identifies the missing Date column, rejects processing, and asks the user to provide the complete dataset.
